Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Do you believe in fortune telling?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I don't mean to say it comes true all the time, but sometimes...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}You should take it more seriously.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I don't mean to say it comes true all the time, but sometimes...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Yeah, that's right. There's a fortune-teller in this club.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Everyone calls her "Den Mother" or "Mama"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I heard if she tells your fortune, there's no getting a second opinion. What she tells you will come true.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Why don't you visit her?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}You know that fortune-teller? The one they call "Den Mother" or "Mama"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}She's got a very weird presence... It's like she's in another world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I want her to tell my fortune, but I don't have the courage to talk to her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I had Mama tell my fortune, and it's true what they say... Her fortunes aren't like the others.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Everything that came out of her mouth was so abstract...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}She never said anything like, "Be careful of this," or "This will bring good fortune."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I don't really have any friends... But I'm trying to make some.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}So I asked Mama how I could meet more people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Her answer was still pretty abstract, but it helped me come up with a solution![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I'll try doing it sometime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Hey, listen to this![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I did what Mama told me, and I made a real friend![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}This is so great![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Maybe I should have my fortune told next time I'm in trouble...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I lost a ring in my room, and the other fortune-teller couldn't find it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}But when I asked Mama, she told me where it was on the first try![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I couldn't believe my eyes when I found it. It felt like a dream...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I saw this outfit at the clothing department that comes in two colors.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}They both looked great...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}But I know that colors can affect your luck, so I couldn't decide.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I'm here to ask Mama which color I should buy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}That friend I met after Mama told my fortune... I can't seem to get closer to her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I don't understand. Maybe I should ask Mama for advice...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Whoa, Mama's fortune telling is great![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I did just what Mama told me to, and I found out something new about my friend...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}And now, we're closer than ever![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Incredible... I really look up to that woman.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I think I'm depending on Mama too much these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}There are other people who want to have their fortunes told. I can't hog her all to myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I guess for now, I'll stick with the fortunes you get from TV and magazines...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Those never come true, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}She worries too much...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I'm just interested in fortune telling, that's all. Why does she have to act like that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I'm just trying to get as many fortunes as possible...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}It's just sound daily planning, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}My friend fell victim to that Apathy Syndrome.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I asked Mama if she could help me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}She said she can't "see" her, so she can't do anything now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I went out to eat the other day, but I forgot to check my fortune beforehand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}So I couldn't decide what to order. I started to sweat...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Good thing they had a magazine with a fortune telling column.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Remember when I told you how I forgot to check my fortune and started to sweat?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Now I check my fortune first thing in the morning, right after I wake up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}If I forget to check it... I can't get through the day without sweating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I'm totally hooked on fortune telling now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I can't bring every single question to Mama, so I watch TV and read magazines...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Everything I wear, and everything I eat, I decide with my fortune.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}All I have to do is get as many fortunes as possible![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}The town is becoming strange... But if you stay here, you'll be fine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Just listen to what Mama says, and nothing bad can happen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I've lost myself. I've become just a puppet who obeys the orders of fortune-tellers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}She said she can't see my fortune anymore...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}I always thought that paying attention to your fortune was the smart way to live...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}Have I really become a puppet?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 405}What am I supposed to do...?[n]{f 1 1}
